channel.title: SPCC Computer Club
channel.description: Recent content on SPCC Computer Club

item.title: Rectangular Geometry
item.description: Rectangular Geometry # Rectangle Object # A rectangle can be defined by two points: $(x_1, y_1)$ the bottom-left point and $(x_2, y_2)$ the top right point, where $x_2 \geq x_1$ and $y_2 \geq y_1$.
